inputs.name: input
inputs.desc: Token-major activation stream already arranged in merged-tile order

outputs.name: output
outputs.desc: Merged stream formed by grouping each contiguous run of merge_size^2 tokens

impl.c_declaration: void spatial_merge_contiguous_tiled(const float *input, float *output, int grid_h, int grid_w, int embed_dim, int merge_size);

notes: Merge contiguous groups of merge_size^2 tokens from an activation stream that already uses merged-tile traversal order.
